meta.description: SDXL txt2img → InvokeAI node editor expected output summary

key_differences_from_comfyui: Node IDs are UUID format strings (e.g. node-0001-0000-0000-000000000001), NOT sequential integers
Node types use snake_case (main_model_loader, denoise_latents), NOT PascalCase (CheckpointLoaderSimple, KSampler)
Edges use explicit {source: {node_id, field}, destination: {node_id, field}} format, NOT [from_id, slot, to_id, slot, link_id] format
SDXL prompts use sdxl_compel_prompt with positive_prompt + positive_style fields
Latent init uses noise node, NOT EmptyLatentImage
Decode uses l2i node, NOT VAEDecode

expected_dependencies.platform_note: Works with InvokeAI v4.x Node Editor
